name: @codegeneai/cloudflare-tunnel-action
description: Run a cloudflared connector on a GitHub Actions runner.
author: CodeGeneAI

scripts.build: bunx @vercel/ncc build src/main.ts -o dist --minify && bunx @vercel/ncc build src/post.ts -o dist-post --minify && mv dist-post/index.js dist/post.js && rm -rf dist-post
scripts.verify-dist: bun run build && git diff --exit-code -- dist/
